suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit deployment prerequisite to run `git push` before `bash deploy.sh`, since deploy.sh pulls `origin/main` on the server and otherwise can deploy stale code.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-scrutiny-blocking-issues review observed stale deployment until a manual push/redeploy; deploy.sh runs `git pull origin main` while current worker guidance omits an explicit push step.

rejectedObservations.observation: Secret-handling guidance gaps, frontend visibility-check guidance gaps, DO_SPACES_PREFIX guidance gaps, and deploy/SSH operational notes from prior feature reviews.
rejectedObservations.reason: already triaged and captured in round 1 synthesis
